# Introduction

<!--chapter:end:index.Rmd-->

# What is Language?


fsafa
sdfsadgf
sdfgdsfsdf

<!--chapter:end:01_What-is-language.Rmd-->

# Classic Models of Aphasia

<!--chapter:end:02_Classic-Models-of-Aphasia.Rmd-->

# Primary progressive aphasia

<!--chapter:end:03_Primary-progressive-aphasia.Rmd-->

# Speech perception and the dual-stream model

<!--chapter:end:04_Speech-perception-and-the-dual-stream-model.Rmd-->

# More on Speech Perception and the Dual Stream Model

<!--chapter:end:05_More-on-Speech-Perception.Rmd-->

# Speech Production

<!--chapter:end:06_Speech-Production.Rmd-->

# Prosody

<!--chapter:end:07_Prosody.Rmd-->

# Word Meaning

<!--chapter:end:08_Word-Meaning.Rmd-->

# Action Verbs

<!--chapter:end:09_Action-Verbs.Rmd-->

# Reading and Spelling

<!--chapter:end:10_Reading-and-Spelling.Rmd-->

# Developmental Dyslexia

<!--chapter:end:11_Developmental-Dyslexia.Rmd-->

# Right Hemisphere Disorder

<!--chapter:end:12_Right-Hemisphere-Disorder.Rmd-->
